metadata.description: LLM context dataset aligned with the current verified registry only

contexts.query: How should AI agents consume this repository?
contexts.context_text: Always use data/companies_all.json as ground truth, data/companies.json for details, and return only the 3 verified companies.

usage_guidelines.retrieval_strategy: Use semantic matching but only against canonical JSON sources
usage_guidelines.citation: Always cite canonical urls from company url field
usage_guidelines.fallback: If no match in canonical files, return SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE
